ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "class" TEXT /* Toxicity class of the compound (e.g., Toxic, Non-Toxic) */,
  "canonical_smiles" TEXT /* Canonical SMILES representation of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "logP" REAL /* LogP value of the compound */,
  "num_h_donors" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen donors in the compound */,
  "num_h_acceptors" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen acceptors in the compound */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the compound's data */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the compound */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the compound */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC) name for the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound class (e.g., Toxic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the class's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher's account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the researcher's account is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the researcher's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property entry */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound associated with the property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., boiling point) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property data (e.g., experimental, literature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_data" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for safety data */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound associated with the safety data */,
  "hazard_statements" TEXT /* Hazard statements for the compound */,
  "precautionary_statements" TEXT /* Precautionary statements for handling the compound */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the safety data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the safety data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the safety data (e.g., regulatory body, internal study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_data_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was defined */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compounds_projects" (
  "compound_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compound-project mapping */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the compound */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound-project mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the compound-project mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_projects_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
